case_title: SILVIA LORENA MONTOYA VS. NELSON Y. RODRIGUEZ

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTOYA, SILVIA LORENA AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, NELSON Y. DBA JASMINE JANITORIAL SERVICE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
